# Pull Request Template

Thank you for contributing to the AI‑Ops Framework.

## Summary

Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Related Issues

List any related issues or link to discussions.

## Changes Made

-  
-

## Testing

Describe how you tested your changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the verified project folder architecture  
- [ ] My contribution is clear, modular, and thoroughly documented  
- [ ] I have synchronized all new or altered files with the machine-readable `ai-ops-manifest.json`  
- [ ] I have updated and alphabetized all relevant human-readable registries in the root `README.md`  
- [ ] I have verified that all file headers and code blocks comply with the repository formatting specifications  
- [ ] I have reviewed and verified full compliance with the Code of Conduct and Project Governance guidelines
